title: Norwich Duff

{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person

'''Norwich Duff''', also credited as "Norwick Duff," is a [[Wikipedia:British people|British]] screen [[Wikipedia:Actor|actor]] who has appeared in several major [[Wikipedia:Film|motion pictures]] and numerous British, [[Wikipedia:Canadian|Canadian]], and [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] [[Wikipedia:Television program|television series]]. His major film credits include [[Wikipedia:Superman (film)|''Superman'']] ([[1978]]), [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] ([[1980]]), and [[Wikipedia:Short Circuit 2|''Short Circuit 2'']] ([[1988]]), while his television credits include [[Wikipedia:Space: 1999|''Space: 1999'']] ([[1976]]), ''Evergreen'' ([[1985]]), [[Wikipedia:Street Legal (TV series)|''Street Legal'']] (1988, [[1991]]), and [[Wikipedia:The Strain (TV series)|''The Strain'']] ([[2015]]).

==Biography==
Duff also landed a small part in [[George Lucas]]'s [[1980]] blockbuster, [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']],<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> which today stands as the defining role of his career.<ref name="Norwich Duff - IMDb">{{IMDb|url=name/nm0240403|text=Norwich Duff}}</ref> Playing [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel officer]] [[Jeroen Webb]] on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]],<ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back">''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]'', pg. 135. "[Gary] Kurtz watches as [Harrison] Ford rehearses with [Irvin] Kershner a scene in which Solo gives orders to a Rebel soldier (Ray Hassett was the deck officer; Norwich Duff played the second officer)."</ref> Duff appears fleetingly and without dialogue in the film's sequence in which actor [[Harrison Ford]] ([[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]) departs the base atop a [[Tauntaun/Legends|tauntaun]] mount in search of the missing [[Mark Hamill]] ([[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]), against the protests of base personnel.<ref name="ESB" /><ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back" />

Duff's film credit in ''The Empire Strikes Back'', along with four other actors, lists him only as one of several "Other Officers" in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Forces]].<ref name="ESB" /> As such, this may create some ambiguity regarding which character Duff portrays in the film—indeed, among many ''[[Star Wars]]'' online fan sites, including ''Star Wars'' author [[Bob Vitas]]'s now-defunct ''The Completely Unofficial Star Wars Encyclopedia'', Duff is widely incorrectly credited as playing the role of Rebel officer [[Trey Callum/Legends|Trey Callum]],<ref name="CUSWE">{{WebCite|url=http://www.cuswe.org/arclist.asp?search=N|text=The Completely Unofficial Star Wars Encyclopedia - Version 12.0|author=Bob Vitas|date=2010|work=The Completely Unofficial Star Wars Encyclopedia|quote=Norwich Duff This performer portrayed Trey Callum in ''Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back''.|archivedate=20110720010717}}</ref><ref name="Star Wars Autograph Collecting">{{WebCite|url=http://www.starwarsautographcollecting.com/Autographs/StarWarsTrilogy/StarWarsTrilogyAutographsTemplate.htm|text=0005_red|work=Dahoov's Autograph Collecting|quote=Norwich Duff -Rebel Officer Trey Callum|archivedate=20100112164112}}</ref><ref name="StarTiger">{{WebCite|url=http://www.startiger.com/fanmail_address/Duff,+Norwich_id78417.html|text=Norwich Duff - Contact Details, Autographs, Fan Mail Address at StarTiger|work=StarTiger - The Autograph Community|quote=Actor-Star Wars Episode V:The Empire Strikes Back(Rebel Officer-Trey Callum)|archivedate=20120829203111}}</ref><ref name="Planet Dagobah">{{WebCite|url=http://planetdagobah.com/autographclassitrilogy.htm|text=Autograph Classic Trilogy|work=JMY'S PLANET DAGOBAH|quote=Norwich Duff Rebel Officer Trey Callum (ESB)|archivedate=20171115021856}}</ref><ref name="I Have a Bad Feeling About This">{{WebCite|url=http://www.geocities.ws/karloff3|text=I Have a Bad Feeling About This|author="karloff3"|work=I Have a Bad Feeling About This|quote=Norwich Duff … Trey Callum|archiveurl=https://archive.vn/VY1Mg}}</ref><ref name="Comcast">{{WebCite|url=http://home.comcast.net/~bfriend/pages/title138.html|text=Star Wars Trilogy (Widescreen Edition)|work=bfriend's DVD Collection|quote=Norwich Duff…Trey Callum (rebel officer)|archivedate=20120829210132}}</ref><ref name="Skooldays">{{WebCite|url=http://www.skooldays.com/categories/movies/mv1138.htm|text=The Empire Strikes Back: Old Memories|work=Skooldays|quote=Trey Callum Norwich Duff|archivedate=20081203155245}}</ref><ref name="zerblatt">{{WebCite|url=http://zerblatt.org/film/person/10279|text=zerblatt.org: film|work=zerblatt.org|language=Norwegian|quote=Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back (Special Edition) (1980) som «Trey Callum (rebel officer)»|archivedate=20051217181035}}</ref> who, in fact, is played by stuntman [[Bob Anderson]].<ref name="Bob Anderson autograph 1">{{WebCite|url=http://www.let-the-wookie-win.com/index.php?showimage=344|text=My Bob Anderson Starwars Autograph|author=Oldbury, Dave Louis|date=2011-06-21|work=Star Wars Autograph Collecting|nobackup=1}}</ref><ref name="Bob Anderson autograph 2">{{WebCite|url=http://www.let-the-wookie-win.com/index.php?showimage=862|text=My Bob Anderson Starwars Autograph|author=Oldbury, Dave Louis|date=2011-08-27|work=Star Wars Autograph Collecting|nobackup=1}}</ref><ref name="Bob Anderson autograph 3">{{WebCite|url=http://www.let-the-wookie-win.com/index.php?showimage=863|text=My Bob Anderson Starwars Autograph|author=Oldbury, Dave Louis|date=2011-08-27|work=Star Wars Autograph Collecting|nobackup=1}}</ref> Duff's role as Jeroen Webb was officially confirmed by a [[Lucasfilm]] publication in the [[2010]] book ''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]''.<ref name="The Making of The Empire Strikes Back" />

Duff's character, Jeroen Webb, was first provided a [[canon]] name and personal backstory through [[Decipher, Inc.]]'s [[1996]] ''[[Hoth Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Hoth Limited">{{CCG|set=Hoth Limited|cardname=Jeroen Webb}}</ref>
